versions.changelog_entry: Initial 92-item forensic punch list covering 9 categories (methodology, code quality, data/corpus, configuration/infrastructure, documentation/reporting, reproducibility/provenance, logging/observability, testing gaps, miscellaneous/nits). Five CRITICAL items identified: preregistration lock unfilled, ai_baseline_similarity null for all authors, comparison_report.json empty, all authors role=control, post-hoc threshold changes, HIGH confidence verdict contradicts exploratory status.
